{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Archlord fire
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord fire]] can rebuild a person's body and spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
